method.file_preview: static resolution of every internal anchor to an explicit local file; no root-absolute or directory-only internal hrefs permitted
method.http_preview: real local HTTP server with every public HTML page fetched and checked for HTTP 200 plus HTML payload
method.browser_environment_note: The controlled Chromium runtime blocks file:// and loopback navigation by administrator policy; full browser rendering is tested separately through network-free set_content with the actual release CSS, JavaScript, and images inlined.
